title: goodenia stellata
intro: Goodenia stellata, also known as the star goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its star-shaped flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Goodenia stellata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and prevent infection, which can be beneficial for people suffering from eczema, acne, and other skin-related issues. Goodenia stellata is often prepared as a tea or tincture and can also be applied topically to the affected area as a poultice or ointment.
